title: Peppery Tender Spanish Chickpeas Stir-fry
description: A vibrant and flavorful weeknight dish featuring tender chickpeas with a peppery kick, served as a vegetarian-friendly main course.

ingredients.name: 15 oz canned or dried chickpeas
ingredients.notes: Soak overnight and rinse before cooking if using dried

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add onions and sauté until translucent.
Stir in garlic and cook for about 30 seconds.
Throw in bell peppers, cumin, smoked paprika, and bay leaf. Sauté for another minute.
Push vegetables to one side of the pan; add chickpeas to the other side.
Pour in lemon juice and zest if using, tossing gently to coat.
Stir well to combine all ingredients evenly and cook for about 5-7 minutes more until heated through and slightly crispy on the edges.
Serve hot over rice or quinoa as a vegetarian main course.
